analyses.title: Meridian Capital — Q2 diligence
analyses.sourceText: Meridian Capital Q2 Financial Summary. Revenue is up 12% quarter over quarter. EBITDA margins are steady at 24.5%. Total debt outstanding is $45M, backed by strong cash flows of $12M annually. No material defaults or litigation.

stages.name: Document Parsing
stages.result: Successfully parsed Meridian Capital financial statement. Identified Q2 period, 12% QoQ revenue increase, 24.5% EBITDA margins.

stages.name: Financial Review
stages.result: Evaluated leverage ratio (Debt/EBITDA) at 3.75x. Strong cash flow of $12M provides 2.6x debt service coverage. Liquid assets are adequate.

stages.name: Risk Assessment
stages.result: Evaluated credit, operations, and external risks. Low leverage breach risk. Steady operations. Classified as LOW RISK.

stages.name: Executive Summary
stages.result: Synthesized diligence review. Recommended for standard approval with normal covenant monitoring.

agentOutputs.Risk Assessor: Evaluated credit, operations, and external risks. Low leverage breach risk. Steady operations. Classified as LOW RISK.
agentOutputs.Decision Summarizer: Synthesized diligence review. Recommended for standard approval with normal covenant monitoring.

analyses.title: Northgate Holdings — Vendor audit
analyses.sourceText: Standard vendor contract with Northgate Holdings for IT consulting services. Retainer of $50,000 per month. Section 8 (Termination) states either party may terminate with 90 days notice. Section 14 (Renewals) specifies auto-renewals with no price rate caps or index adjustments.

stages.name: Contract Validation
stages.result: Validated contract clauses. Flagged auto-renewal clause in Section 14 for lacks rate caps. 90-day termination notice is standard.

stages.name: Risk Assessment
stages.result: Flagged the missing renewal rate cap as a moderate financial risk. Vendor can arbitrarily increase price during renewal. Rating: MODERATE RISK.

agentOutputs.Contract Validator: Validated contract clauses. Flagged auto-renewal clause in Section 14 for lacks rate caps. 90-day termination notice is standard.
agentOutputs.Risk Assessor: Flagged the missing renewal rate cap as a moderate financial risk. Vendor can arbitrarily increase price during renewal. Rating: MODERATE RISK.

analyses.title: Pinegate Logistics — Debt restructuring
analyses.sourceText: Pinegate Logistics has missed its leverage covenant targets of <4.0x for two consecutive quarters. Current leverage stands at 5.2x due to fuel price inflation and fleet maintenance capital expenditures. Seeking waiver and debt restructuring from credit committee.

stages.name: Document Parsing
stages.result: Extracted financials: current leverage is 5.2x (violating covenant threshold of 4.0x). Restructuring request.

stages.name: Financial Review
stages.result: Debt servicing capacity is severely strained. Operating cash flows dropped 35%. Leverage ratio of 5.2x is highly critical without major restructuring.

stages.name: Risk Assessment
stages.result: High probability of covenant breach default. Fleet valuation has depreciated. Highly susceptible to market fluctuations. Rating: HIGH RISK.

stages.name: Executive Summary
stages.result: Drafted restructure briefing. Recommended legal oversight, strict capital expenditure freeze, and senior collateral controls.

workflows.name: Full diligence review
workflows.description: Document Parser → Financial Reviewer → Risk Assessor → Decision Summarizer

workflows.name: Covenant compliance check
workflows.description: Document Parser → Financial Reviewer → Compliance Officer

reports.title: Meridian Capital Diligence Report
reports.text: Stable liquidity, consistent margins across all business lines. No material misstatements identified. Total leverage of 3.75x is securely service-covered by Q2 cash flows. Liquidity cushions are well within expected limits.

reports.title: Northgate Holdings Risk Report
reports.text: One vendor contract renews without a rate cap clause — flagged for renegotiation before September. Section 14 represents exposure to potential arbitrary service price increments without caps. Strongly advise negotiation.

reports.title: Pinegate Logistics Restructure Report
reports.text: Debt restructuring plan shows covenant breaches across two facilities — legal review and waivers are heavily recommended. Operating margins are highly volatile.

knowledge.name: Orchestrix Underwriting Rules v4
knowledge.content: Underwriting standard constraints: Maximum allowed leverage is typically 4.0x. Debt service coverage ratio (DSCR) must exceed 1.25x. Vendor rate escalation caps must be capped at 5% annually.

knowledge.name: Covenant Waiver Reference templates
knowledge.content: Waiver templates for standard covenant exceptions. Specifies financial reporting deadlines, restructure penalties, and increased oversight boards.
